assumptions: Villain 5-bet range is extremely tight at micro-stakes

action_summary.preflop: Hero opens UTG, faces multiple re-raises, and commits all-in 200BB deep.

analysis.summary: Hero stacks off with JJ against a very strong preflop range at deep stack depth.
analysis.main_takeaway: JJ should not commit all-in 200BB deep versus tight 5-bet ranges.

good_plays.label: UTG open with JJ
good_plays.explanation: JJ is a standard open from early position.

areas_to_improve.label: Deep stack overcommitment
areas_to_improve.mistake: Calling or jamming versus a tight 5-bet range.
areas_to_improve.recommended_line: Fold JJ versus 5-bet when effective stacks exceed 150BB.

improvement_tips: Avoid stacking off with JJ at 150BB+ without strong reads.
Prefer call or fold versus 4-bets at micro-stakes.
Use smaller 4-bet sizes and fold to jams.
